## Quality Checklist

Confirm your template meets the startup-os quality bar:

### Structure Requirements
- [ ] Starts with a clear H1 title that describes the template's purpose
- [ ] Includes relevant status badges (if applicable: draft/active, completion %, last updated)
- [ ] Contains a "How to Use" section explaining who should use it and when
- [ ] Uses `[PLACEHOLDER]` or `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` format for fields users must fill
- [ ] Has clear section headings (H2, H3) that organize content logically

### Content Requirements
- [ ] Includes Claude Code prompts or instructions (comments/hints for AI assistance)
- [ ] Provides at least one concrete example or sample content
- [ ] Cross-references related templates in other modules where relevant
- [ ] Contains a "Next Steps" section linking to follow-up templates or actions
- [ ] Free of typos, grammatical errors, and formatting issues

### Testing Requirements
- [ ] I have tested filling out this template manually
- [ ] I have tested filling this template using Claude Code
- [ ] All placeholders are discoverable and self-explanatory
- [ ] The completed template produces a useful, actionable document
